name: Beef Noodle Skillet
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces frozen mixed vegetables (broccoli, cauliflower, carrots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef and onions in a large skillet until meat is no longer pink.
2. Add water, bouillon cubes, gravy, and thyme. Bring to a boil, stirring often.
3. Stir in noodles and frozen vegetables. Bring to a boil again, then reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer for 8-10 minutes, stirring twice, until noodles are tender.
5. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream.
